description: REQ-FEED-014 DESIGN.md token requirement explicitly states '再試行 ボタン: Primary Blue #0075de, 8px 16px padding, 4px radius, 15px weight-600'. Implementation paints the retry button background #dd5b00 (Orange/Warn token), the same color used for the destructive confirm button in REQ-FEED-012. This collapses the visual distinction between dangerous actions and recovery actions, and violates DESIGN.md §4 token allow-list (NFR-FEED-003).
recommendation: Change retry-button background to #0075de, set padding to 8px 16px, font-size 15px, font-weight 600 to match REQ-FEED-014 + DESIGN.md §10. Reserve #dd5b00 for destructive primary CTA only.
